title: Corruption in governance is not merely a legal violation but a deep ethical deficit. Examine the ethical dimensions of corruption. Analyse how it erodes public trust in institutions.
description: Q6. Corruption in governance is not merely a legal violation but a deep ethical deficit. Examine the ethical dimensions of corruption. Analyse how it erodes public trust in institutions.
